chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH BENCH AT SUKKUR Const. Pett. No. D-1288 of 2024 DATE OF HEARING ORDER WITH SIGNATURE OF JUDGE Hearing of case (priority) 1. For orders on office objections at flag ‘A’ 2. For hearing of CMA No. 5125/2024 (S/A)\ 3. For hearing of main case 08.10.2025 Mr. Zulfiqar Ali Naich, Assistant Advocate General along with Hafiz Lal Muhammad Tunio DEO(ESHS) Ghotki at Mirpur Mathelo ***************** None present for the petitioner, nor any intimation received. The learned AAG has placed on record the compliance report on behalf of respondent No.3, which is taken on record. From the perusal of compliance report it appears that the purpose of filing the present petition has been served, the grievance of the petitioner has been redressed, and the petitioner has joined the place where she sought to be posted. In view of the above circumstances, the present petition is disposed of as having become infructuous. JUDGE JUDGE M.Ali*
